name: ChatGPT: Send Current Composer (JS Only)
description: Reuse the current ChatGPT tab and send the composer through fixed content-script DOM actions, without CDP Runtime.evaluate.

help.summary: Send a prompt from the current ChatGPT composer using fixed content-script DOM actions instead of CDP Runtime.evaluate.

parameters.name: message_text
parameters.description: Prompt text to send from the current composer

examples.description: Send from the active ChatGPT composer
examples.command: rzn-browser run chatgpt send-current-composer-js-v1 --param message_text="Who let the dogs out?"

help.returns: Current ChatGPT URL and compact send metadata after the JS-only send attempt.
notes: Uses the current authenticated ChatGPT tab.
Avoids CDP Runtime.evaluate; it relies on fixed content-script DOM actions, not arbitrary string eval.

browser_automation.description: Current-tab ChatGPT composer send flow using fixed content-script DOM actions instead of CDP-backed execute_javascript.

sequences.name: chatgpt_send_current_composer_js
sequences.description: Reuse current tab -> wait for composer -> run page-bridge JavaScript -> return send metadata.

required_variables.name: message_text
required_variables.description: Prompt text to send from the current composer

steps.name: Allow the current ChatGPT surface to settle
Wait for the ChatGPT composer
steps.selector: #prompt-textarea, textarea[placeholder*='Message' i], textarea[placeholder*='Send a message' i], textarea[placeholder*='Ask anything' i], textarea[aria-label*='message' i], textarea[aria-label*='chatgpt' i], form textarea, div[role='textbox'][contenteditable='true'], div[role='textbox'][contenteditable='plaintext-only'], [contenteditable='true'][data-testid*='composer'], [contenteditable='plaintext-only'][data-testid*='composer'], div.ProseMirror[contenteditable='true'], div.ProseMirror[contenteditable='plaintext-only']

steps.name: Fill and submit through fixed content-script DOM actions
steps.selector: #prompt-textarea, textarea[placeholder*='Message' i], textarea[placeholder*='Send a message' i], textarea[placeholder*='Ask anything' i], textarea[aria-label*='message' i], textarea[aria-label*='chatgpt' i], form textarea, div[role='textbox'][contenteditable='true'], div[role='textbox'][contenteditable='plaintext-only'], [contenteditable='true'][data-testid*='composer'], [contenteditable='plaintext-only'][data-testid*='composer'], div.ProseMirror[contenteditable='true'], div.ProseMirror[contenteditable='plaintext-only']
